title: Lorie Leigh
compiled_truth: Lorie Leigh is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-30 to 2002-03-29), Lorie Leigh sent 11 and received 72 emails, totalling 83 interactions.
